name: Chocolate Walnut Filled Cake
recipeIngredient: Granulated fructose or other sugar replacement - 3 tbsp
Granulated fructose or other sugar replacement - 1 tbsp
recipeInstructions:
------------
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 3-quart tube pan.
For the cake:
1. In a bowl, sift together the dry ingredients (cake flour, cocoa powder, baking powder).
2. Add the remaining ingredients (milk, margarine, eggs) and beat until smooth and creamy.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
For the filling:
1. In a bowl, combine the filling ingredients (flour, chopped walnuts, milk, sugar replacement, baking powder, vanilla extract).
2. Mix with a fork until well blended.
3. Spoon the filling over the center of one layer of chocolate cake, being careful not to touch the sides of the pan.
4. Bake for 35 minutes or until a tester comes out clean.
5. Allow to cool in the pan for 20-25 minutes, then invert onto a plate or rack and let cool completely.
6. Frost with a glaze if desired.
Serving Size: 24 servings
Calories per Serving: 84
Exchange List: 2/3 Bread, 1/2 Lean Meat
